creator: pete@altadena.net
text:
Class could be sw-bug or doc-bug depending on what resolution
	one wants...

	in -lcrypt:
	"crypt_format" in man page is "crypt_default" in the program
	At least it works once you figure out the right word...

Fix: 

Make doc and lib consistent.  Doesn't matter much which word is
	used.
How-To-Repeat: 	See description; put "crypt_format" in /etc/auth.conf and it is
	ignored.
